title: After the Satsuki Sho: Leaving Claw Marks

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I don't care how little progress I make, but I'm going to change! Even if it's just a smidge, I will change!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'LL SHOW YOU... THE REAL MEEEEE!
HYAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after exerting all of her strength, Mejiro
Palmer is unable to win the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wheeze... I'm spent... That's enough running... for me today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh. Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You did really well. And I dunno know how to put
it, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You seem different. More serious... Or actually,
it's more like you're scarier now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Scarier?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. When we were kids, I never saw you make a
grim face like the one you had on during the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you like that made me feel like you've
changed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, maybe... But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Sorry. I haven't changed at all.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I just never showed my true self before. And now,
I've finally lifted my mask a little...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm back! It felt awesome to really let loose out
there, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't really change Ryan's view much. I guess
it's hard to convince people you aren't a Goody
Two-shoes.
choice_data_list: But you still made an impression on her, right?
But you still made an impression on her, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I think I've changed a little in her eyes. She
at least thinks I'm pretty good now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta keep boosting my vibes even more until
they get through to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The image everyone has of Mejiro Palmer being a
good little kid comes from old, sepia-toned
memories from her childhood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she may have been able to change the hue of
that image today, even just a little bit.
